query:
-- Find Back2Health customer
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount, unmatchedBillingCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Back2Health%' OR xeroContactName LIKE '%Back2Health%' OR name LIKE '%Back 2 Health%';

-- Find all services for Back2Health
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.serviceTypeDetail, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.phoneNumber, s.connectionId, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerName LIKE '%Back2Health%' OR s.customerName LIKE '%Back 2 Health%'
   OR s.customerExternalId IN (
     SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%Back2Health%' OR name LIKE '%Back 2 Health%'
   );

-- Find billing items for Back2Health
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.matchStatus,
       bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.category
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Back2Health%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Back 2 Health%';
